assertions.title: Token selector modal shows balances and selection behavior

steps.action: Open swap page and click token selector trigger (from-token button)
steps.expected: Token selector modal opens with search and token list including balances
steps.observed: Modal opened with search input and token list entries for CASH and USDC.

steps.expected: Each token row shows icon, name, ticker, and user balance
steps.observed: Token rows showed icon/name/ticker only (no balance text/value shown).

steps.expected: Modal closes and selected token updates in swap input
steps.observed: Modal closed and from-token updated to USDC.

evidence.network: GET http://localhost:3100/depth (fetch); no /balances request captured during token-modal interaction.

assertions.issues: Selection behavior works, but modal does not display per-token user balances.

assertions.title: Price details expandable section exists and expands with expected fields

steps.action: Inspect swap card in default state
steps.observed: No price-details expandable control/section was visible.

steps.action: Enter amount and re-check swap card for expandable details
steps.expected: Expandable details can be opened to show exchange rate, price impact, minimum received
steps.observed: No expandable section appeared; fields for exchange rate/price impact/minimum received were not found.

evidence.network: No additional relevant requests observed for price-details expansion behavior.

assertions.issues: Required expandable price-details section is missing.

assertions.title: Escape closes modal and focus returns to trigger element

steps.action: Open token selector modal from the USDC token selector button
steps.expected: Modal opens and focus is inside modal
steps.observed: Modal opened and focus was on the search input (placeholder: "Search by name or ticker").

steps.expected: Focus returns to the same trigger element
steps.observed: Focus returned to the same stored trigger button (USDC token selector). Identity check: activeIsStoredTrigger=true.

evidence.network: No network dependency for Escape/focus behavior.

focusTargetAfterEscape.className: flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-secondary px-3 py-1.5 shrink-0 hover:bg-surface-hover transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-card

summary: Revalidated 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-A11Y-002) and 2 failed (VAL-SWAP-004 missing balances in token modal; VAL-SWAP-010 missing price-details expandable section).
